Plot Condition

Source: R/plot_condition.R
plot_condition.Rd

Plot Condition

Usage

plot_condition(
  data,
  var = c("Acadian redfish", "American plaice", "Atlantic cod", "Atlantic croaker",
    "Atlantic herring", "Atlantic mackerel", "Atlantic menhaden", "Atlantic wolffish",
    "Barndoor skate", "Black sea bass", "Blackbelly rosefish", "Bluefish",
    "Bluntnose stingray", "Bullnose ray", "Butterfish", "Clearnose skate", "Cusk",
    "Fourspot", "Goosefish", "Haddock", "Little skate", "Longhorn sculpin", "Ocean pout",
    "Offshore hake", "Pollock", "Red hake", "Rosette skate", "Roughtail stingray",
    "Scup", "Sea raven", "Silver hake", 
     "Smooth dogfish", "Smooth skate",
    "Spiny butterfly ray", "Spiny dogfish", "Spot", "Spotted hake", "Summer flounder",
    "Thorny skate", "Weakfish", "White hake", "Windowpane", "Winter flounder",
    "Winter skate", "Witch flounder", "Yellowtail flounder"),
  return = TRUE
)

Arguments

data

data frame with condition data from bottom trawl survey

species

species of interest to plot

Value

A ggplot
